name: goliath/hp-process
title: Homepage – Installation Process
description: Four-step installation process section with icons, heading, accent text, and step cards.

accent.default: Unique solution to end the repetitive cycle of upright damage.

body1.default: From assessment to installation to lifetime protection – we handle everything so you can focus on your business.

body2.default: Our team can install GOLIATH™ in your warehouse in as little as 30 minutes.

default.title: Identify Damaged Upright
default.description: Comprehensive evaluation of your racking system. Our expert team identifies all areas of concern and provides detailed recommendations.

default.title: Apply Fast, Permanent Repair
default.description: Installation takes just 30 minutes per upright. Minimal disruption to your operations – get back to work quickly.

default.title: Lifetime Warranty Activated
default.description: Your repair is covered forever. If any impact damage occurs, we replace the affected parts at no cost to you.

default.title: Peace of Mind Guaranteed
default.description: Rest easy knowing your racking is safe, compliant, and protected. Focus on running your business, not worrying about safety.
